title: Hashmaps 1
description: HashMap stores key-value pairs. You need to import it from std::collections.
instructions: Complete the function to create a HashMap of fruit baskets.
explanation: HashMap<K, V> stores a mapping of keys to values. It must be imported from `std::collections`. Create one with `HashMap::new()` and add entries with `.insert(key, value)`. If you insert a key that already exists, the old value is replaced.
